name: part_008
file: tmp_【Ayunda Risu 3D Birthday】The Rise of the NUT Warrior 【#TheNutWarrior】 [VYSAfYJ6FhI]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_008.webm

scenes.description: Opening overview of a colorful 3D village with a bell tower and rainbows.
Ayunda Risu celebrates defeating a giant monster with some Risuners.

subtitles.original: Whoa! I can't believe that we've defeated the giant monster!
subtitles.english: Whoa! I can't believe that we've defeated the giant monster!

subtitles.original: It's actually this cute. Aw!
subtitles.english: It's actually this cute. Aw!

subtitles.original: As a celebration, let's sing one more song!
subtitles.english: As a celebration, let's sing one more song!

subtitles.original: ひらひら放つ月
subtitles.english: Fluttering, the moon gives off its light

subtitles.original: 夜明けが見たいって
subtitles.english: Saying that I want to see the dawn

subtitles.original: 叫んだ空
subtitles.english: The sky I shouted to

subtitles.original: ヒバリ
subtitles.english: Hibari (Skylark)

subtitles.original: 神様気取りのままのトモダチが
subtitles.english: A friend who's still acting like a god

subtitles.original: 世界を愛して壊しちゃいました
subtitles.english: Loved the world and ended up breaking it

subtitles.original: 誰のもの 誰のもの 私のもの
subtitles.english: Whose is it? Whose is it? It's mine

subtitles.original: 邪魔者は排除した
subtitles.english: I've eliminated all obstacles

subtitles.original: カントがなんとか言ってたって
subtitles.english: Even if Kant said something about it

subtitles.original: エゴに捕まって拒めないんだ
subtitles.english: I'm caught in my ego and can't refuse

subtitles.original: まだ足りない もの足りない 死にたくない
subtitles.english: It's not enough, something's missing, I don't want to die

subtitles.original: 機械仕掛けの狂った声で
subtitles.english: With a clockwork, crazed voice

subtitles.original: 大人達が言う「もう、いいよ」
subtitles.english: The adults say, "That's enough already"

subtitles.original: 「うんざりだよ」「死んどろーも」
subtitles.english: "I'm fed up," "Death syndrome"

subtitles.original: 「愛してるわ」
subtitles.english: "I love you"

subtitles.original: 「もうやめてよ」
subtitles.english: "Stop it already"

subtitles.original: 心でモノを量ってきた
subtitles.english: I've been weighing things with my heart

subtitles.original: 売れば幸せですか？
subtitles.english: Will I be happy if I sell it?

subtitles.original: 作られたショーケース 抜け出したい基盤
subtitles.english: A fabricated showcase, a base I want to escape

subtitles.original: 世界 移ろいの果て
subtitles.english: At the end of the world's transitions

subtitles.original: 魂をいったいどこに隠した？
subtitles.english: Just where did you hide your soul?

subtitles.original: 甘やかな香が宵分に
subtitles.english: A sweet scent in the night divide

subtitles.original: 天つ音め 歌と舞う
subtitles.english: Celestial sound maiden, dance with the song

subtitles.original: ヒバリの空
subtitles.english: The skylark's sky

subtitles.original: 輪廻転生 機械論 進化論
subtitles.english: Reincarnation, Mechanism, Evolution

subtitles.original: 人が人でなくなってゆく
subtitles.english: Humans are ceasing to be human

subtitles.original: 血に形り焼べ色取れ
subtitles.english: Formed in blood, burned and colored

subtitles.original: 泡沫を未来へ届けるよ
subtitles.english: I'll deliver the bubbles to the future

subtitles.original: 空から空へと繋げるよ
subtitles.english: Connecting sky to sky

subtitles.original: 限りなく泣くひばり達を遺す
subtitles.english: Leaving behind the skylarks that cry without end

subtitles.original: 何て本を聞かせてくれたっけ？
subtitles.english: What kind of book did you read to me again?

subtitles.original: メリディアの二人のこと
subtitles.english: The story of the two in Meridia

subtitles.original: 愛してる 嘘でもいいから一度だけでも
subtitles.english: I love you; even if it's a lie, just once

subtitles.original: 聞かせてよ
subtitles.english: Let me hear it

subtitles.original: どこかで どこで笑ってました？
subtitles.english: Somewhere, just where were you laughing?

subtitles.original: 今は幸せですか？
subtitles.english: Are you happy now?

subtitles.original: 置き去りのまま 届かない想い
subtitles.english: Left behind, feelings that won't reach

subtitles.original: 「ごめんね」 「何で言えなかったかな」
subtitles.english: "I'm sorry," "Why couldn't I say it?"

subtitles.original: 悲しい思い出は風に隠した
subtitles.english: I hid the sad memories in the wind

subtitles.original: 歌よ あなたのもとへ
subtitles.english: O song, go to you

subtitles.original: 天つ音め 時を舞う
subtitles.english: Celestial sound maiden, dance through time

subtitles.original: ヒバリの空
subtitles.english: The skylark's sky

subtitles.original: 独りでも笑っていけるんだ
subtitles.english: I can keep smiling even if I'm alone

subtitles.original: 独りでは生きてゆけないんだ
subtitles.english: I can't live on my own

subtitles.original: ずっと拒んだり 愛したり
subtitles.english: Constantly refusing, constantly loving

subtitles.original: 裏で殺されたりすれば生きていけるよ
subtitles.english: If I'm killed behind the scenes, then I can live

subtitles.original: 心でモノを量ってきた
subtitles.english: I've been weighing things with my heart

subtitles.original: 売れば幸せですか？
subtitles.english: Will I be happy if I sell it?

subtitles.original: 作られたショーケース
subtitles.english: A fabricated showcase

subtitles.original: もう逃げ出さない不可避未来
subtitles.english: An inevitable future I'll no longer escape

subtitles.original: 月先の鍵
subtitles.english: The key beyond the moon

subtitles.original: 魂をいったいどこに隠した？
subtitles.english: Just where did you hide your soul?

subtitles.original: 甘やかな香が宵分に
subtitles.english: A sweet scent in the night divide

subtitles.original: 天つ音め 歌と舞う
subtitles.english: Celestial sound maiden, dance with the song

subtitles.original: 夜明けを告げたら
subtitles.english: If the dawn is announced
